lessonsLearned.title: Design Systems > Individual Components
lessonsLearned.description: Studied GitHub Primer, Chakra, Material. All follow systematic approach: tokens → primitives → compounds → complete systems.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: Design consistency comes from constraints (design tokens), not creativity

lessonsLearned.title: Accessibility Must Be Built In
lessonsLearned.description: GitHub, IBM Carbon, Material all prioritize WCAG AAA. Accessibility isn't an add-on - it's foundation.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: WCAG AA minimum. Color contrast 4.5:1. ARIA required. Keyboard nav mandatory.

lessonsLearned.title: Utility-First CSS Scales Better
lessonsLearned.description: Bootstrap vs Tailwind. Bootstrap = component classes. Tailwind = utility classes. Tailwind wins for customization and theming.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: Utility-first allows dynamic styling. Design tokens + utilities = perfect combo.

lessonsLearned.title: Storybook is Documentation Requirement
lessonsLearned.description: Every major system (Chakra, Ant, Shadcn) uses Storybook. It's not optional - it's how components get adopted.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: Component code + Storybook docs + visual testing = production-ready

lessonsLearned.title: Dark Mode Requires Token Thinking
lessonsLearned.description: Shadcn, Tailwind show how to do dark mode right. Not color inversion - it's token switching.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: Each token has light/dark variant. CSS variables make switching trivial.

lessonsLearned.title: Design-to-Code Automation Matters
lessonsLearned.description: Figma tokens, Penpot show automation reduces friction. Design changes auto-sync to code.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: JSON tokens can sync Figma → code. Reduces hand-off errors by 90%.

lessonsLearned.title: Motion Improves UX Perception
lessonsLearned.description: Framer Motion shows animation best practices. 500-800ms optimal for perception.
lessonsLearned.key_insight: GPU-accelerated animations. Spring physics > linear easing. Gesture-driven for mobile.

lessonsLearned.title: Icons Must Be SVG-Based
lessonsLearned.description: Ant Design, Bootstrap show SVG icon systems. Allows customization (color, size, animation).
lessonsLearned.key_insight: SVG > PNG/Font icons. Customizable, scalable, animatable.
